igbo.create_charts_import_data_explore_stat: Mepụta chart, bubata data ma nyochaa ọnụ ọgụgụ
igbo.label: Label
igbo.click_tell_the_story_to_have_the_ai_tu: Pịa «Kọọ akụkọ ahụ» ka onye nkuzi AI kọwaa ihe chart gị na-egosi n'ọkwa ọgụgụ ị họọrọ.
igbo.nearly_invisible_low_opacity: 👻 Ọ fọrọ nke nta ka ọ ghara ịhụ anya (ìhè dị ala)
igbo.over_zoomed_lose_context: 🔍 Zoom karịrị akarị (efu ihe gbara gburugburu)
igbo.sliders_for_opacity_zoom_x_zoom_y_disc: Sliders maka ìhè, zoom X, zoom Y. Ịgụ ọdịdị nke ọnọdụ 4 dị iche iche. Enweghị akara, enweghị ngosi.
igbo.hypothesis_when_is_a_chart_most_legibl: Echiche: Kedu mgbe chart kacha mfe ịgụ?
igbo.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Ị rapaara — gosi ajụjụ mepere emepe
igbo.tufte_rules_maximize_data_ink_ratio_wh: Iwu Tufte: mee ka oke data-ink dịkwuo elu. Kedu ihe nke ahụ pụtara?
igbo.when_does_zoom_obscure_context: Kedu mgbe zoom na-ezochi ihe gbara gburugburu?
igbo.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Aghọtara m — kọwaa n'okwu nke m
igbo.design_note_discrete_4_state_visual_ma: Ndetu imewe: akara ọdịdị nke ọnọdụ 4 dị iche iche; enweghị akara mma; enweghị ngosi — dịka imewe si dị.

lingala.create_charts_import_data_explore_stat: Sala ba chart, kɔtisa data mpe luka statistiques
lingala.label: Etiquette
lingala.what_story_does_this_data_tell: ✨ Data oyo ezali koloba lisolo nini?
lingala.click_tell_the_story_to_have_the_ai_tu: Fina «Loba lisolo» mpo molakisi AI alimbola oyo chart na yo ezali kolakisa na niveau ya kotanga oyo oponi.
lingala.sliders_for_opacity_zoom_x_zoom_y_disc: Ba slider mpo na pole, zoom X, zoom Y. Botángi ya elilingi ya ba état 4 ekeseni. Bapwɛ te, bomonisi te.
lingala.hypothesis_when_is_a_chart_most_legibl: Hypothèse: Tango nini chart ezali pɛtɛɛ mpo na kotánga?
lingala.tufte_rules_maximize_data_ink_ratio_wh: Mibeko ya Tufte: matisa ratio ya data-ink. Yango elimboli nini?
lingala.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Nasosoli — limbola na maloba na ngai
lingala.design_note_discrete_4_state_visual_ma: Note ya design: elembo ya elilingi ya ba état 4 ekeseni; score ya kitoko te; bomonisi te — ndenge design ezali.
